name: Waldorf Astoria Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar.
2. Beat eggs and add to the creamed mixture.
3. Add melted chocolate.
4. Mix dry ingredients and add alternately with milk.
5. Stir in vanilla and nuts.
6. Bake in greased loaf pans (2) or a large bundt pan for 40 to 45 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Cool in pans for 10 to 15 minutes, then turn out onto a platter.
MAKE FROSTING:
1. Cream the cheese until soft.
2. Work in sugar until fluffy.
3. Stir in melted chocolate and add vanilla and coffee.
4. Frost the cake when cooled.
